name: insecure-auth-app
description: Intentionally insecure React + ASP.NET Core auth app for CSC 436 HW5 - DO NOT deploy to production

scripts.start: concurrently "dotnet run --project backend/InsecureAuthApp.Api.csproj" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: dotnet build backend/InsecureAuthApp.Api.csproj && npm run build --prefix frontend
